title: Storage Integration

artifacts.description: Storage script with store and list commands for lessons and primitives
Updated pipeline script with --store flag for end-to-end analysis + storage
HITL review queue for candidate primitives from V's edits

tables_created.name: voice_lessons
tables_created.schema: id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, content_type TEXT, lesson TEXT, anti_pattern TEXT, positive_pattern TEXT, confidence TEXT, global_candidate INTEGER, source_changes TEXT, source_pair_id INTEGER, content_hash TEXT UNIQUE, created_at TEXT

tables_created.name: candidate_primitives
tables_created.schema: id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, text TEXT, type TEXT, function TEXT, source TEXT, source_pair_id INTEGER, approved INTEGER, created_at TEXT

notes_for_orchestrator: MEMORY RETRIEVAL PATTERN FOR W3.2: Lessons are stored in semantic memory with block_type='voice_preference' and tagged with 'content_type:<type>', 'voice_preference', and 'global' (if applicable). Query with: SELECT b.content FROM resources r JOIN blocks b ON r.id = b.resource_id JOIN tags t ON r.id = t.resource_id WHERE r.path LIKE 'voice://lessons/%' AND t.tag = 'content_type:cold_email'
DEDUPLICATION: Lessons are deduped via content_hash (MD5 of lesson + anti_pattern + positive_pattern). Running --store on the same pair again will skip duplicates.

PRIMITIVE APPROVAL WORKFLOW: Primitives go to candidate_primitives table with approved=0. After HITL review, either: (1) approve → copy to primitives table with status='approved', or (2) reject → set approved=-1. Review queue in N5/review/voice/primitives-from-edits.md needs manual approval workflow.
VOICE-LESSONS.MD FORMAT: The '#### Lesson:' header is truncated at 50 chars for readability. Full lesson text is in the Pattern field. Consider future improvement to generate a shorter title.
SEMANTIC MEMORY EMBEDDING: Lessons are embedded on storage. The N5MemoryClient handles this automatically via add_block(). No separate embedding step needed.
RETRIEVAL PROFILE SUGGESTION: Consider adding a 'voice-lessons' profile to N5MemoryClient profiles dict with path_prefix='voice://lessons/' for easier retrieval in W3.2.
